description_long: This object is a bunch of dark purple grapes attached to a light brown, woody stem. The grapes are oval-shaped and vary slightly in size, with a glossy, smooth surface that reflects light. The bunch is elongated and loosely clustered, with individual grapes spaced apart along the branching stem. The stem is visibly segmented, with smaller offshoots connecting each grape to the main axis. The grapes appear ripe and plump, with no visible blemishes or damage. The overall appearance is naturalistic, resembling a freshly picked bunch of grapes suitable for display or consumption.
description: A loosely clustered, elongated bunch of dark purple grapes on a light brown stem, with glossy, smooth-skinned fruit.
description_view_0: The bunch is seen at an angle, showing the main stem and most of the grapes, highlighting their spacing and the branching structure.
description_view_1: Viewed from the side, the bunch appears narrow, with grapes aligned vertically and the stem mostly obscured.
description_view_2: This view shows the opposite angle from view 0, revealing the other side of the stem and the arrangement of grapes along its length.
description_view_3: A direct side view, similar to view 1 but from the opposite direction, showing the linear alignment of grapes and the thinness of the bunch.
attribute_clustering_pattern: random clusters along a branching stem
